refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under defined network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated network link with QoS prioritization for teleoperation data.
DP3: Real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment of transmission parameters.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates communication quality control, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP3) tightly with adaptive protocol to mitigate latency risks.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and communication stack responsible for teleoperation control and communication quality management.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data transmission.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to send status and packet loss metrics to NGHE Solution and other modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands and task instructions.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level system module; contains overall coordination but not detailed teleoperation communication logic.
Physical vehicle components; limited role in communication protocol implementation.
Primary module responsible for teleoperation communication quality; best containment and minimal diffusion.
Focuses on safety alerts; indirect involvement in communication quality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for telemetry reporting.
Dependency on Network Link interface quality and availability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for telemetry data to avoid duplication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (adaptive communication protocol) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and is logically decoupled.

diffusion_risks: Minor risk of telemetry data duplication between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment for DP1 with minimal diffusion to other modules.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and network link monitoring is feasible with existing interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality management to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit telemetry interface data formats and update protocols to prevent duplication.
Consider integration points with Safety Services for safety-critical communication alerts.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the requirements with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Verification and containment risks are manageable.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Telemetry interface supports required data throughput.
open_risks: Latency impact due to retransmission in adaptive protocol.
Potential interface duplication between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data logs showing packet loss under test conditions.
Performance metrics of adaptive communication protocol in operational environment.
